TransDigm Group (TDG).strategy: Acquire sole-source aerospace parts companies, raise prices
TransDigm Group (TDG).pricing_power: Proprietary/sole-source parts with NO competition = 30-100% price increases
TransDigm Group (TDG).key_insight: TransDigm parts are the MOST OVERPRICED in aviation. BUT 90% of their parts are <$5,000 making PMA uneconomical. Target the 10% that are >$5,000.
TransDigm Group (TDG).arbitrage_signal: DOD IG audits publicly name the most overpriced TransDigm parts. Cross-ref against FAA DRS for PMA alternatives. DOD found $20.8M excess profit on just 105 parts.

dod_audit_examples.data_refusal: Refused cost data for 15 of 16 sampled contracts
dod_audit_examples.regulatory_gap: 95%+ of DOD contracts below mandatory disclosure thresholds

TransDigm Group (TDG).pma_vulnerability: Only economical for PMA competitors to target parts >$5,000 with sufficient volume. HEICO actively targets these.

HEICO Corporation (HEI).pma_discount_over_5yr: 50-60% (HEICO doesn't pass through OEM price increases)
HEICO Corporation (HEI).strategy: Create FAA-approved alternatives to expensive OEM parts at scale
HEICO Corporation (HEI).key_insight: HEICO is your PRICING BENCHMARK for aftermarket parts. Their prices represent the competitive floor. 19,500 parts vs <2,000 for nearest competitor = massive moat.
HEICO Corporation (HEI).arbitrage_signal: When HEICO enters a new PMA category, the OEM price for that part drops 10-30% within 12-24 months. Monitor new PMA filings as leading indicator.
HEICO Corporation (HEI).wencor_acquisition: $2.05B (Aug 2023) - little to no PMA overlap, added USM/rotable exchange/distribution capabilities
HEICO Corporation (HEI).pma_management_program: Airlines get HEICO parts + third-party PMA sourcing + quality audits + tailored cost-saving strategies as one package
HEICO Corporation (HEI).lht_partnership: Lufthansa Technik holds 20% stake in HEICO Aerospace

AerSale Inc (ASLE).strategy: Buy whole aircraft, tear down, sell USM parts + engines
AerSale Inc (ASLE).key_insight: AerSale's win rate (10%) shows how competitive the feedstock market is. Prices for whole aircraft being parted out are HIGH relative to parts-out value.
AerSale Inc (ASLE).arbitrage_signal: AerSale's quarterly feedstock disclosures reveal which aircraft types are being acquired for teardown. This signals which parts will enter the USM market in 3-6 months.

FTAI Aviation (FTAI).aar_exclusive: Exclusive CFM56 USM deal with AAR through 2030
FTAI Aviation (FTAI).pma_jv: Joint venture with Chromalloy for PMA engine parts (started 2021)

chromalloy_jv_details.demand: Backlog sold out through 2025, booking 2026 slots

FTAI Aviation (FTAI).strategy: Vertically integrated CFM56 empire: acquire engines, modularize, PMA parts, sell USM
FTAI Aviation (FTAI).key_insight: FTAI is doing at INDUSTRIAL SCALE what you're doing at deal level. Their Chromalloy PMA JV saves $2M per shop visit - half their module margin comes from PMA.
FTAI Aviation (FTAI).arbitrage_signal: FTAI's module approach (swap modules instead of full overhaul) is disrupting MRO pricing. MROs that can't match this speed lose customers = they need YOUR help sourcing modules.

Chromalloy (Engine PMA Specialist).description: Only independent provider of FAA-approved PMA parts for hot section of aerospace engines
Chromalloy (Engine PMA Specialist).safety_record: 6 billion+ flight hours, ZERO airworthiness directives
key_partnerships: Lufthansa Technik (V2500, CF6, CFM56 PMA development)
AAR Corp (exclusive CF6-80C2 HPT blade distribution)
Chromalloy (Engine PMA Specialist).key_insight: Chromalloy is the ENGINE PMA king - if you need hot-section parts at discount, they are the source. Their backlog is sold out.
Chromalloy (Engine PMA Specialist).arbitrage_signal: New Chromalloy PMA certifications signal immediate cost reduction opportunity for specific engine shop visits. Track their approvals.

AAR Corp (AIR).strategy: Parts distribution + MRO services + government contracts
AAR Corp (AIR).key_insight: AAR is the largest independent MRO/distribution company. Their pricing on the distribution side IS the market benchmark for parts.
AAR Corp (AIR).arbitrage_signal: AAR's exclusive deal with FTAI for CFM56 USM means they control a huge chunk of CFM56 parts flow. If you're sourcing CFM56 parts, you're eventually competing with AAR or buying from them.
